name: 72"x14" Floral Table Runner - Threshold™
description:
Brighten up your spring table with this Floral Table Runner from Threshold™. Featuring a multicolor floral print in earthy hues on an ivory background, this table runner adds sweet style to your table spread, making it just the right pick for springtime entertaining. Made from 100% cotton, you can toss it in the washing machine for a quick refresh whenever needed.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
